title: Consumer contract: nightlights signals per H3 cell (v1)
description: Night-time light context signals read from the H3 knowledge store by domain agents and the dashboard. Ingestor-written signals: NTL_RADIANCE, NTL_LIT_FRACTION, ECONOMIC_ACTIVITY_INDEX, DATA_CONFIDENCE, ACTIVITY_CLASS. Consumers must never use nightlights signals as the sole basis for operational recommendations — they are structural context only.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when this payload was assembled.

cells.description: One entry per H3 cell that has nightlights signals in the store.

signals.description: Signal values keyed by signal name.

NTL_RADIANCE.description: Mean VIIRS Day/Night Band radiance in nW/cm²/sr.

NTL_LIT_FRACTION.description: Fraction of sub-pixels above 0.3 nW/cm²/sr threshold (0–1).

DATA_CONFIDENCE.description: NTL data confidence. 0.90 = real VIIRS, 0.65 = cloud/gap-filled, 0.0 = synthetic.

ACTIVITY_CLASS.description: Activity class stored as integer ordinal (0=dark, 1=residential, 2=commercial, 3=industrial). Decode with ACTIVITY_CLASS_LABELS.

last_ingested_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime of last ingest for this cell.

summary.description: City-level nightlights summary statistics for dashboard display.

synthetic_used.description: True if any synthetic NTL data is present. Must trigger a warning in any dashboard consumer.

cloud_contamination_notice.description: Non-null when cloud-contaminated cells are present.
